prompt:

Create a 16:9 blog thumbnail for article "Softmax Kernel 时性能优化". NO text.

Hua stone steps) rising on the right, with thin streams of glowing golden #C0A35D liquid flowing downward from peak to base, redistributing across the steps with perfectly normalized flow (suggesting softmax normalization). Painted in soft grey-black brush strokes. A single firefly cyan #9CF0BD glow at the top of the staircase.

Style: Brush-painted, atmospheric, low contrast. Same warm parchment-green background.
